title: Hosts
content:
Here's to the host and the hostess,
        We're honored to be here tonight;
     May they both live long and prosper,
        May their star of hope ever be bright.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Hosts"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
